title: Default override ‘run.oci.keep_original_groups’ annotation, according to a new option abort groups.
body:
### Feature request description

I think "run.oci.keep_original_groups" is an abnormal behavior of crun. When I have a "–userns=host" config, I always expect having the same groups of host. So it' better to have a new option abort this to notice the podman users.

### Suggest potential solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

### Have you considered any alternatives?

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

### Additional context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

comments.body: You can just use the --group-add=keep-groups option which sets that annotation.

> You can just use the --group-add=keep-groups option which sets that annotation.

I see. Maybe use this as default.
You can modify containers.conf, I believe to set this as default.
